trivia_bullets.text: Innocent Bystander is a red 2/1 Goblin Citizen — the Scryfall type line confirms Goblin, not Elf, despite the pointed ears visible in the art (Goblins in Ravnica's visual language can be narrow-featured). The Citizen subtype marks it as unaffiliated with any guild [Scryfall].

Flavor text: "Whoops, this isn't my street! Don't mind me! I'll just be on my way while you enjoy your . . . very sharp knives." — Speaker unnamed [Scryfall]. The ellipsis and fragmented sentence perfectly convey a character talking themselves out of a mugging — the kind of noir street comedy MKM deploys at common.

The trigger — Investigate when dealt 3 or more damage — turns the creature into a pain-triggered clue generator. It functions as a pseudo-incentive to let opponents attack through it, trading a 2/1 body for a Clue token. EDHREC rank 22898, confirming minimal Commander uptake [Scryfall].

Artist Warren Mahy. Previewed via the official Wizards card gallery on 2024-01-19 [Scryfall preview data]. The Investigate keyword (Create a Clue token: artifact with 2, Sacrifice to draw a card) is one of MKM's four featured mechanics alongside Disguise, Collect Evidence, and Suspect [Scryfall, magic.wizards.com/en/news/feature/murders-at-karlov-manor-mechanics].
